Assembly: The assembly drEpiCili1.hap1.1 is based on 35x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.

Assembly: The assembly daSenSylv1.hap2.1 is based on 26x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. This genome has been assembled using PacBio and HiC data and phased. The result is two curated haplotypes. A haplotypic inversion was observed in the region on chromosome 18 (47.8-55.5 Mbp). A large number of centromeric repeats is in the unlocalised sequences. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 2 (43 - 48 Mbp), chromosome 5 (40 - 44 Mbp), chromosome 13 (53.9-58.1 Mbp), chromosome 14 (34.8 - 38.8 Mbp) are unknown.

Assembly: The assembly drEpiHirs1.hap1.1 is based on 58x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The order and orientation of contigs is uncertain in the following regions: chromosome 3, 8 Mb to 10.5 Mb; chromosome 5, 4.2 Mb to 7.2 Mb; chromosome 7, 7.6 Mb to 10.2 Mb; chromosome 12 6.4 Mb to 9.6 Mb; chromosome 17, 8.8 Mb to 11 Mb.

Assembly: The assembly ilActPoly1.hap1.1 is based on 70x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The order and orientation of contigs along chromosome 28 is uncertain between 4.5 Mb and 5.9 Mb.
